non_claims: Images are not production-ready Unity assets.
Images do not close M88 strict visual blockers.
Images must pass local image-to-3D, Blender cleanup, Unity import, gameplay binding, player-camera visibility, gameplay event evidence, and ledger promotion before any production credit.
